title: ChatGPT rolls out new $100 Pro subscription to challenge Claude
description: OpenAI has rolled out a new Pro subscription that costs $100 and is in line with Claude's pricing, which also has a $100 subscription, in addition to the $200 Max monthly plan. [...]
author: Mayank Parmar

title: Nearly 4,000 US industrial devices exposed to Iranian cyberattacks
description: The attack surface targeted by Iranian-linked hackers in cyberattacks against U.S. critical infrastructure networks includes thousands of Internet-exposed programmable logic controllers (PLCs) manufactured by Rockwell Automation. [...]
author: Sergiu Gatlan

title: Analysis of one billion CISA KEV remediation records exposes limits of human-scale security
description: Analysis of 1 billion CISA KEV remediation records reveal a breaking point for human-scale security. Qualys shows most critical flaws are exploited before defenders can patch them. [...]
author: Sponsored by Qualys

title: CPUID hacked to deliver malware via CPU-Z, HWMonitor downloads
description: Hackers gained access to an API for the CPUID project and changed the download links on the official website to serve malicious executables for the popular CPU-Z and HWMonitor tools. [...]
author: Bill Toulas

title: Microsoft: Canadian employees targeted in payroll pirate attacks
description: A financially motivated threat actor tracked as Storm-2755 is stealing Canadian employees' salary payments after hijacking their accounts in payroll pirate attacks. [...]
author: Sergiu Gatlan

title: Google rolls out Gmail end-to-end encryption on mobile devices
description: Google says Gmail end-to-end encryption (E2EE) is now available on all Android and iOS devices, allowing enterprise users to read and compose emails without additional tools. [...]
author: Sergiu Gatlan
